who: logistics managers in freight brokerage firms managing 5-10 vehicles
offer: For logistics managers in freight brokerage firms processing 5-10 vehicles, inefficient mileage tracking causes missed service deadlines. We provide mileage monitoring instead of manual tracking through spreadsheets.
problem: Inability to track vehicle mileage and service schedules effectively.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for logistics managers seeking solutions
Indie Hackers posts discussing similar mileage tracking issues
DM outreach to logistics managers with a demo video
Community forums where logistics managers share tools and tips
try_it: Let users try Mileage tracking dashboard and Service due date alerts on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a 1-page landing page with a clear CTA
Produce a short demo video of the manual workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Save common inputs as templates for quick access
Set default reminder schedules for users
Enable CSV import for existing mileage data
Provide one-click export for simple reports
Streamline onboarding process with fewer steps
